title: Zamorakian hasta
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |name = Zamorakian hasta |image = [[File:Zamorakian hasta.png]] |release = [[9 January]] [[2014]] |update = Minigame Grouping |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = Yes |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = Yes |options = Wield, Drop |examine = An evil one-handed spear. |value = 300000 |weight = 3.000 |exchange = Yes |id = 11889 |aka=Zhasta}} [[File:Zamorakian hasta detail.png|left|150px]] The '''Zamorakian hasta''' is made by taking a [[Zamorakian spear]] to [[Otto Godblessed]], along with a payment of 300,000 [[coins]] (only 150,000 if the player has completed the [[Elite Kandarin Diary]]). Despite the examine text calling it a [[spear]], the Zamorakian hasta '''does not''' deal full damage when fighting the [[Corporeal Beast]]. It is a popular [[weapon]] against enemies weak to [[stab]], such as [[dragons]]. Due to its reasonable [[crush]] bonus, it is also often used against enemies weak to crush, such as [[Vet'ion]]. All of the stat bonuses remain the same as a Zamorakian spear, and it retains its [[special attack]]. As the hasta can be wielded with off-hand equipment such as a [[shield]] or [[defender]], it is preferable over the spear in all instances except when fighting the [[Corporeal Beast]]. As it can also function as a slash weapon it may be useful in some encounters where several attack styles are needed, such as against the [[Moons of Peril]]. It can be upgraded to the [[dragon hunter lance]] by combining it with a [[hydra's claw]], obtained from the [[Alchemical Hydra]]. The lance has 20% higher accuracy and damage against dragons and many other draconic creatures, but in the process it loses its defensive and prayer bonuses and some of its strength bonus. To make or wield it, players must have completed the [[Barbarian Fishing|Fishing]] and [[Barbarian Smithing|Smithing]] parts of the [[Barbarian Training]] [[miniquest]] (This requires 55 Fishing). The Smithing section requires finishing the [[Tai Bwo Wannai Trio]] quest. Like the Zamorakian spear, the hasta requires an [[Attack]] level of 70. [[Otto Godblessed]] can turn the hasta back into a [[Zamorakian spear|spear]] for free. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = +85 |aslash = +65 |acrush = +65 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = +13 |dslash = +13 |dcrush = +12 |dmagic = 0 |drange = +13 |str = +75 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = +2 |slot = weapon |speed = 4 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Spear |image = [[File:Zamorakian hasta equipped male.png|120px]] |altimage = [[File:Zamorakian hasta equipped female.png|120px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Spear|speed=4|attackrange=1}} ==Special attack== [[File:Shove (Zamorakian hasta).gif|thumb|250px|A player performs the Zamorakian hasta's special attack, ''Shove''.]] The Zamorakian hasta has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Shove'', which it shares with the [[Dragon spear|Dragon]] and [[Zamorakian spear]]. It pushes an opponent back and [[Stun (status)|stuns]] them for three seconds, consuming 25% of the player's special attack energy. The effects of ''Shove'' do not stack, meaning that players cannot use it on a target who is already stunned. Stunned players are also given a one tick (0.6 seconds) period of immunity after a stun wears off during which they cannot be stunned again. This effectively means that ''Shove'' cannot be used on the same player more than once every 6 ticks. In addition to this, as soon as the stun wears off, the stunned player is granted a 5 tick (3.0 seconds) period of immunity against being bound by binding spells like [[Entangle]] or [[Ice Barrage]]. On non-Castle Wars worlds, players within Castle Wars are able to shove targets back-to-back using this special attack.{{PlainCiteNews|url=https://secure.runescape.com/m=news/poll-83-castle-wars-update?oldschool=1|title=Poll 83: Castle Wars Update|newsdate=2 April 2025}} ''Shove'' cannot be used against large monsters, such as [[giants]], because they are too big to push back. If a player tries this, the special attack does not occur and no special attack energy is consumed. A message appears in the chat box, reading, "That creature is too large to knock back!" A general way to tell if the ''Shove'' special attack is able to be used is to determine how much space the target monster takes up. If it takes up more than one game tile, it cannot be shoved. For example, a player can shove an [[ice warrior]], which takes up one game tile, but not an [[ice giant]], which takes up four. ==Creation== {{Tabber |tab1 = No Diary |tab1content = {{Recipe |notes = {{SCP|Quest}} Learn [[Barbarian Training#Barbarian Smithing|Barbarian Smithing]] |members = Yes |ticks = 14 |facilities = Otto Godblessed |mat1 = Zamorakian spear |mat2 = Coins |mat2quantity = 300000 |mat2cost = 1 |output1 = Zamorakian hasta |output1subtxt = No Diary }} |tab2 = Elite Diary |tab2content = {{Recipe |notes = {{SCP|Quest}} Learn [[Barbarian Training#Barbarian Smithing|Barbarian Smithing]]
{{SCP|Diary}} Completed the [[Elite Kandarin Diary]] |members = Yes |ticks = 14 |facilities = Otto Godblessed |mat1 = Zamorakian spear |mat2 = Coins |mat2quantity = 150000 |mat2cost = 1 |output1 = Zamorakian hasta |output1subtxt = Elite Kandarin Diary }} }} ==Products== {{Uses material list|Zamorakian hasta}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Zamorakian hasta}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 7 July 2021 |update = Small Changes & Tweaks |poll = |change = The weapon's position on female players has been adjusted so that they appear to be equipped properly. }} {{Subject changes |date = 28 July 2016 |update = Dragon Spear Changes & Beta 3 |change = You can no longer use the Dragon spear, Zamorakian spear or Zamorakian hasta special attack on a target who is already stunned. In addition to this, players are given a 1 tick period of immunity after a stun wears off in which they cannot be stunned again. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ==Trivia== *Unlike other hastae, the Zamorakian hasta cannot be poisoned. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Stab weapons}} {{God Wars Dungeon}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]]
